column1: Update ONLY the yellow Mkt Value cells each day — everything else recalculates. Snapshot 6/2/2026 · values in USD

● Yellow = Automatically derived from GoogleFinance (Mkt Value).   ● Blue = Cost Basis, a one-time reference (change only when you add/resize a position).   Gain $ = Mkt Value − Cost Basis.  No circular references.
